steps.title: Find the stated fact
steps.content: The text directly states that the Museo de las Américas is in Denver, was founded in 1991, and has more than 4,800 objects in its collection.

steps.title: Choose the supported claim
steps.content: A invents a visitor-count comparison, B contradicts the 1991 founding date, and D contradicts the Denver location. The collection-size statement restates the passage. The answer is C.
